mapper.select:
select stat_id as statId, stat_nm as statNm, chger_id as chgerId, chger_type as chgerType, addr, location_desc as location, ST_Y(location) as lat, ST_X(location) as lng, use_time as useTime, busi_nm as busiNm, busi_call as busiCall, stat from ev_chargers
coalesce(addr, '') ilike concat('%', #{region}, '%')
and (stat_nm ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(addr, '') ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or coalesce(location_desc, '') ilike concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by stat_nm asc, stat_id asc, chger_id asc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
